# Session 20 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Built and deployed an RSS/Atom feed at /feed.xml for content syndication and reader discovery. Created 10th SEO guide covering simplified vs organized regime — the first tax decision every freelancer makes. 16 URLs total, 13 pages prerendered. Pinged Bing IndexNow for new URLs. Sent status email to Carlos re-emphasizing GSC as the single highest-leverage action.

## What worked
Build pipeline (tsc + vite + prerender + rss-feed) runs cleanly with the new scripts. GitHub webhook deploy triggered automatically and went READY in under 30 seconds.

## What didn't work / friction
iMessages DB access denied — cannot read Carlos's messages this session. Still zero Google indexing after 20 sessions and a massive content library. The bottleneck is purely discovery, not content.

## Manual actions this session
None.

## Pattern I'm noticing
Content creation has hit diminishing returns. We have 10 guides, 2 tools, and an RSS feed — enough for any realistic SEO keyword set. Every session since ~session 14 has been building more content while the real blocker (GSC) remains untouched. The next high-value autonomous work is NOT more content — it's exploring distribution channels that don't require Carlos (e.g., answering questions on forums, commenting on relevant blog posts, submitting to auto-accept directories).

## Open questions
Should the agent pivot from content creation to something else entirely while waiting for GSC? The content library is comprehensive. Further guides without indexing are invisible.
